blocked_reason: Approved raw bytes and machine-readable evidence currently live under ignored data/external/ paths; the committed repository has no reviewable, reproducible materialization input, so this PR must not create membership rows.

source_evidence.run_id_policy: run_id is required for future formal materialization, but D1-T04 does not create a run manifest or formal run artifact.

data_version.rule: Versioned D2 membership alignment dataset identifier; D1-T04 does not create materialized rows.

time_segment_id.rule: Configured time segment key; this static cohort must not imply historical point-in-time index membership.

security_id.rule: Project-internal security id from reviewed D1 security mapping; D1-T04 must not invent security_id values.

index_code.rule: Must be 000906 for the CSI 800 official index code.

membership_effective_date.rule: Must use the G0 approved effective date 2026-06-12, not current date or file modification time.

membership_mode.rule: Must be static_cohort and must not claim historical_index_membership.

membership_source.rule: Must identify the approved CSINDEX official static cohort evidence.

source_snapshot_id.rule: Must reference CSINDEX_000906_20260703T100909Z for this contract version.

run_id.rule: Future materialization run manifest id; this PR does not generate a run artifact.

non_goals: Do not run market-data availability filters.

source_registry_requirements.reason: CSINDEX_OFFICIAL is allowed only for G0 universe membership evidence and d2.membership_alignment under DR-001; this PR does not materialize rows.

bias_and_scope_warnings: CSI800_STATIC_2026_06 is a static research cohort, not historical point-in-time CSI 800 membership.
The cohort must not be used to claim historical executable index membership on arbitrary trading dates.
Survivorship and static-backfill boundaries must be disclosed in every downstream use.

downstream_boundary.d3_entry_rule: R0/R stages must not read raw G0 evidence or D2 membership_alignment directly; later research may use membership only through D3 d3.daily_market_observations and a declared data_version.
downstream_boundary.raw_evidence_rule: Raw G0 evidence remains under data/external and is referenced by path and SHA-256; raw bytes must not enter DuckDB.

future_materialization_requirements: Future materialization must read only approved raw evidence and manifests already present in the controlled runtime.
Future materialization must verify raw_evidence_sha256 before parsing.
Future materialization must validate expected_member_count=800 before writing any artifact.
Future materialization must retain source_symbol, ticker, exchange, or an approved security_id mapping reference for every member.
Future materialization must produce reviewable manifests and must not write a committed DuckDB file.
